hb840d548g5947g4889g82b8g147dd40b79df: Selûne. As if mingling with a horde of goblins wasn't bad enough.
h8444eae9g28d4g4159g8421g763efc606889: Let's do what we have to, then get out of here.
h005715a8g8d2eg4671g8568gc961204a3cc9: Not your usual haunt, I take it.
h315b9f52g819ag46d6ga3d1g498223803537: Quite the understatement, but yes. Let's not linger in this place any more than necessary.
h2c37c961gb97bg44b6gbc63gdc8c1a4bda45: Selûne is a bad omen - just look what's befallen her temple.
h6503ceb6g4fbdg4c52gbbcagdc8161b622b9: Though I'll grant it must have been impressive once, in all its profane glory... until someone razed it.
ha250b119g1b0cg452egbf11gea114d27cdb4: No matter. I'll breathe easier once we're clear of this place.
ha3ddbdcag4609g41b0gabf8g2ee2defbc508: You seem to admire whoever left this place a ruin. Got something to say?
hcd511312g08f0g4d1cgaecfg6a19bd3c6058: Only that you're overthinking a simple deduction I made.
hd13bba56gdd41g467fg957fg752a42fa8e70: You can trust me. I want to know what's concerning you.
h418e2f65g85a4g4677g9715g16ff59af77bd: You're not going to let this go, are you? You might wish you had...
h2575bd30ga699g461eg87e1ga3c2b61c51eb: I worship Shar, the Mistress of the Night. It is my holy mission to oppose Selûne, her teachings and her followers.
hc347d13bg3485g4780g8d2bgac8e56cef977: Don't make a fuss, Selûnite - we may be at odds, but I have more important concerns than you right now.
hfd21c617g044cg43d1g98b4g8c4bbca82c00: Don't make a big fuss...? You've been lying to me!
h3103a42bgfba2g44a1gae7bg1d3b80aa5ac9: A lie of omission at most. I'm sure you have some skeletons of your own hidden away.
h0d664150g2351g4a0ag8068gfa28a209ff19: Secrecy is everything for Shar's children. It's our code, our creed, our shield.
h23300ef5ge888g478fg9dd2gadae0f175ec8: I even keep secrets from myself - I had my memories suppressed, so that nothing I knew could be used against the Dark Lady. Once I prove myself, my memories will be restored.
h8aa61d44g7433g493fg8a7fg20e1dd28ab25: I'm not sorry I kept this from you. Not one bit.
h676e421ag3265g4f7cga4fbg992cde00b59b: Though perhaps that might change, if you can show an open mind.
h8ff7b3c8gb0a2g4d29g8e90g6faf5be58493: Let's see how open-minded I can be then: tell me more.
hc888af44g7a91g4af4g8b83gec39d7016675: Talk to me later. We've got more pressing matters to see to right now.
hf4d37a74g5f2eg4769ga456ga60c0674bd21: It's been some time since I met another faithful of Shar. Are you versed in her teachings?
hd2411e61g6fd4g4f46ga38cg6017d7b10263: Of course I am. But we can talk about this later - let's go.
h47518cdfg438bg43b8g8045g7f84ab59c044: We can discuss this later. But let's just try a little more honesty going foward.
h75b6876bga6eag4794ga136g5dd1008806bf: All we can do is try, I suppose...
hf1ac3250gc69cg4852g8b89g766ccb9548b6: I don't know how I feel about this.
h755e3135ge509g44a5g9f70gba538ba89cbb: Who says you have to feel anything?
hfcbf7de8g823cg4f6egb88bg432688368f74: Gather your throughts. Then perhaps we can talk some more.
h7bc281e1g5ab0g4f40gbc06g5ca4a2022d62: I can't trust you. Best if we travel separately for now.
h58705b96g5048g4526gb6e0ga1211c063408: If you insist. Don't expect to fare well without me to save you.
hc98db204gd58cg4db8gbc81gd9bed629d75f: You could have told me. How long were you going to keep this secret?
h56f42d31g987bg43beg94c8gff970c102cf4: Forever, ideally. And you assume too much about what I can and cannot tell.
h5774b51fg3aeeg443dga21cg1b03c984e8e3: I didn't agree to join up with a Shar worshipper.
h79fee4e5gcbc6g47c8gada9g0e73a5b3c350: Then it's your own fault for not asking.
h898b1bfeg7c29g4743g9e83ga615ef13468d: Now that the truth's out, tell me more.
h75374783g6b87g40e4gbf69g1fb9a6a7855f: In future, I expect you to be honest. Let's leave it at that for now.
h733e8096g73a4g4655gab90g5327e0c22e31: I don't care who you worship. We have bigger problems.
h566e2ff3ge6c8g4ae2g939fg4e5bb1f29b50: True. I didn't think you'd react so pragmatically. Perhaps I should have told you sooner.
h545122eag5442g465dg8033ge66b68ee866a: Shar is an abomination. You deceived me.
h09ec71edg886fg4b14g8c51g2e3378fd21f2: Your blindness as much as my deception, Selûnite. We can talk about this later - if you're willing.
h5c10c2f3gc9e6g4209gbcf8g34801165ea96: I bow to Shar also. The Dark Lady must favour us, to have brought us together.
ha84792bdgbdc9g445fgb3eeg4e44bb1257cf: I... yes, she must. I'll offer thanks to her in my prayers - and we should speak more later. Alone, ideally.
he346fe12g21ccg4143ga314g3522626cf246: Fantastic. Monsters in our minds, and around our campfire.
h5ac3cc92g7f1cg4796g97degf523c5a41082: Heavens forbid. We're all entitled to our secrets.
ha2c90a5cg56d0g40fcg88d4g4f0ad6c78380: Knew there was something off about you. Wasn't expecting this though
hc43f4be7ge59eg47e6g9cc6g1d16adf69804: A Shar worshipper? Not my usual quarry - nor my usual ally.
h96851c22g9421g4eb4g98f8gf1cd5b1add7e: You worship Shar? Blimey. She and my beloved Mystra are not exactly friends.
h73e01c47ge178g4417g81cag00ba9b7ecd5e: Now that you have the truth, please don't make a big fuss about it.
h81c855b7gbebcg43c3gb1e8g21259b17b898: Is your hearing failing you? Or your wits perhaps? There's nothing more to say. Let's move.
h7f4d0893g7fb3g4469g95edg0e80db487583: You're hiding something. Explain what's going on - now.
h66b3221bge58fg470cg9a48gb46b85011a00: Spare me your dramatics. I already told you all there is to tell. Let's go.
hc36f4c42ge81ag4eb6g8d4cg966822c15ad1: You're far too eager to disrespect Selûne - what's going on?
h0d48d56cg1144g4cfdg957agec843e1eb876: Selûne, a bad omen? Hardly. What's really the matter?
h843df4e8ga435g401fg88a1g27e3269acfb3: We don't have time for this. Besides, I already explained myself.
he328d22cg6d8ag41f6gbfa8gd2008a5becd5: Though I'll grant it must have been impressive once, in all its profane glory... I wonder what happened.
h698a961dg93ebg4591g8b10ge31b5bcb6e20: Show some respect. This is a sacred place for me... even in its current state.
h9966e78cg7405g40fag8c3fgf04889c78312: Respect's given freely. If your goddess needs to demand it, she's not worthy of it.
h003bf903g000eg4441ga77fgfa8ebe7577cc: Watch your tongue, Sharran. This is a sacred place for me... even in its current state.
h07a5aceag52a3g43cdga7ccg1ab9ef373e95: A ruin abandoned to a murderous horde is a very fitting dedictation to Selûne.
h40b5de8ag807eg400eg90e7g87dd6cd54eef: You don't have to tell me twice.
h12c858fcg1131g4d45g9528g6871c08f08fa: Good. Selûne is a bad omen - just look what's befallen her temple.
